description_long: This object is a red, polygonal aluminum beverage can with a matte black top and a prominent white Coca-Cola logo wrapping around part of its body. The can features a standard cylindrical shape with slightly faceted sides, giving it a geometric appearance. The top of the can includes a typical pull tab opening mechanism, rendered in black with a small silver tab in the center. The main body is predominantly red, with the iconic Coca-Cola script logo visible on one side, while the rest of the can is plain red. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of rust, and the surface appears clean and undamaged. The can is empty, as indicated by its context as discarded street trash.
description: A red aluminum beverage can with a black top and a large white Coca-Cola logo, featuring a standard pull tab and a clean, undamaged surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo in white script on a red background, with the black top and pull tab visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain red body of the can with no visible logo or text, and the black top with pull tab.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the red body of the can and the black top, with no visible branding or text.
description_view_3: Angled view revealing the edge of the Coca-Cola logo on the red body, with the black top and pull tab partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: Large white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around the red body of the can.
